🖥️ Don't Power Off During Updates!

An animated guide for all Tangerine staff — use Auto-play or tap Next

🔊 Press play — audio syncs to scenes automatically 0:00 / 0:00
▶ Synced
1
Meet Temi — just a regular work day
This is Temi. She uses her laptop every day for work.
Like all of us, Temi relies on her device to stay productive. She's in the middle of a busy morning when something unexpected appears on her screen...
2
A message suddenly appears!
"Updates are underway. Please keep your computer on."
Temi has never seen this before. Should she shut down? Close the lid? Keep working? She's not sure what to do!
💡 This message means your laptop is installing critical system updates right now — it needs you to leave it on!
3
What's actually happening inside your laptop
Your laptop is doing critical surgery on itself!
It's rewriting core system files — the building blocks of everything your laptop does. The CPU, storage, and memory are all working together. Interrupting now is like cutting the power during brain surgery!
4
❌ What happens if you power off mid-update
Powering off mid-update can destroy your laptop!
Files get stuck halfway through being rewritten. The system doesn't know where it left off — and your laptop may refuse to start ever again. This means a call to IT, data loss, and days without your device.
💥 Result: Bricked laptop, lost work, costly IT repair
5
✅ The right thing to do — just wait!
Temi waited patiently — and everything worked perfectly!
She plugged in her charger, left the laptop on, and grabbed a cup of tea. When she came back 10 minutes later, it had restarted on its own and was ready to go!
🎉 Result: Safe laptop, zero data loss, back to work!
6
Temi's 4 golden rules — remember these!
Remember these 4 rules every time you see the update message!
Plug in → Leave it on → Don't force restart → Call IT if worried. Four simple steps that keep your device safe and save everyone a headache!
7
Stay powered. Stay productive! 💻
You now know exactly what to do!
A few minutes of patience keeps your laptop safe and working for the long term. Share this with a colleague who might need a reminder!
📞 Questions or worried about an update? Reach us on Tangerine Suite or send an email to ITSupporttht@tangerine.africa — we're always here to help. Kind regards, IT Support Team
